resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when terms update.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when terms update.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of re-signing when terms update, as outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific information or confirmation regarding the implementation of this requirement. Without concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm that the system notifies active climbers to re-sign after a waiver update, the validation cannot be completed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the implementation of the re-sign requirement when terms update.
